title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at VIT University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at VIT University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at VIT University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About VIT University:
VIT University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VIT University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
